programs.title: Home Shopping
programs.desc: A show that offers a variety of product demonstrations and great deals for consumers looking to buy them.

programs.title: Days Of Our Lives
programs.desc: Cat and Chad have an awkward reunion. Philip and Gabi share a little romance. Leo online stalks Javi's new boyfriend. EJ kicks Gwen out of the DiMera mansion. Theo remains hopeful Lexie will return to him.

programs.title: The Young and the Restless
programs.desc: Victor makes good on a promise, Diane finds Jack and Nikki in a compromising position, and Victoria digs for dirt on Phyllis.

programs.title: JAG
programs.desc: Harm begins having flashbacks of his murdered girlfriend that he knew from the academy, who looks amazingly like Mac.

programs.title: The Living Room
programs.desc: The Living Room help turn the top deck of a cruise boat into a top spot for viewing Sydney Harbour, Baz designs a driftwood-inspired table lamp and Miguel takes barbequed snapper to a new level.

programs.title: The Bold & The Beautiful
programs.desc: Will finally learns the shocking truth.
